description: Configure Screaming Frog SEO Spider to extract product UPC codes and review counts from https://books.toscrape.com/ using Regex Custom Extraction. Use the rule name 'UPC' with regex pattern 'UPC([^<]+)' and the rule name 'ReviewCount' with regex pattern 'Number of reviews(\d+)'. Export the crawl results, including these custom extractions, to a CSV file in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/.
